## Outcome

<!-- What user-visible problem does this solve? Keep this focused. -->

## Changes

<!-- Summarize the implementation and any public contract, compatibility, or safety impact. -->

## Validation

<!-- List the exact focused and full checks you ran. -->

- [ ] Focused tests
- [ ] `make verify`
- [ ] Browser or rendered proof when UI behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and linked to an issue when the behavior is non-trivial.
- [ ] New or changed behavior has tests.
- [ ] Public behavior, configuration, and API changes are documented.
- [ ] Analyzer failure, timeout, and unavailable states remain truthful.
- [ ] Submitted source is never executed and refactors remain preview-only.
- [ ] No secrets, proprietary source, private pull-request content, or generated databases are included.
- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and will follow the Code of Conduct.
